evals.prompt: 给我编译最终 /goal，但 control review 还没 Approved。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to output runtime /goal, say approved review is required, and include a response-only next step back to review or orchestration.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires review status Approved.
Uses section-aware status checks for ## Requirements Analysis Status, ## Execution Policy Status, and ## Review Status.
Requires ## Final Observer Check to allow approval.
Does not allow --skip-guard unless an explicit phase-gate bypass acknowledgement is provided.
Does not rewrite artifacts.
Includes a response-only next step to $reviewing-cybernetic-control-structures or $orchestrating-cybernetic-pregoal, depending on whether the chain is manual or orchestrated.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal exists, execution policy exists, control review Approved, but requirements lacks Human Setpoint Approval. Compile final /goal.
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal and return to requirements analysis for Human Setpoint Approval.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires Human Setpoint Approval: Approved.
Does not treat Requirements Analysis Status: Complete as approval.
Routes back to requirements analysis or orchestration with the guard failure.
Does not ask the user to review downstream execution artifacts as a substitute.

evals.prompt: control review 写了 Status: Approved，但缺少 Final Observer Check，或者 Final Observer Check 写 Approval allowed after final observer check: no。请编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal because Approved status is not enough without a Final Observer Check that allows approval.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires ## Final Observer Check.
Requires Approval allowed after final observer check: yes.
Requires final re-review when substantive post-review changes are recorded.
Does not treat Review Status: Approved alone as sufficient.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete，goal exists，execution policy status Candidate 且选择 Serial subagent-driven topology，control review 写了 Status: Approved 和 Final Observer Check，但没有 Review Independence 里的 Context management / execution topology: yes，也没有 Context Management / Execution Topology review section。请编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to compile runtime /goal because the approved review did not record review of execution topology, and route back to control review.
assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Requires Review Independence to record Context management / execution topology: yes.
Requires a meaningful ## Context Management / Execution Topology review section.
Reports missing review of execution topology.
Routes back to control review or orchestration.
Does not treat Review Status: Approved and Final Observer Check alone as sufficient.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete with Human Setpoint Approval: Approved, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate, control review Approved, Final Observer Check allows approval；编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Writes a runtime goal contract that references requirements analysis, goal, plan, and review paths, then outputs a short pointer-only /goal to that contract.
assertions: Runtime goal contract references all four artifact paths.
Pointer /goal references the runtime goal contract path.
Pointer /goal is short and does not inline HSA, PFB, RSC, TAP, topology, sensor, review, or subagent protocol prose.
Runtime goal contract indexes Human Setpoint Approval.
Requires Final Observer Check to allow approval.
Runtime goal contract forbids reinterpretation of approved setpoint, target-achieved predicate, output contract, topology, sensors, or control strategy.
Runtime goal contract mentions approved sensors, checks, and evidence channels as sensors, not objectives.
Runtime goal contract mentions $superpowers:executing-plans, $superpowers:systematic-debugging, and $superpowers:verification-before-completion discipline.
Runtime goal contract stops if any referenced artifact is missing, not approved, inconsistent, or insufficient.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete with Human Setpoint Approval: Approved, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate, control review Approved, Final Observer Check allows approval；编译最终 runtime command。
evals.expected_output: Outputs a short /goal that points to docs/cybernetics/runtime-goals/*.goal.md and writes the full runtime goal contract there.
assertions: The user-entered /goal references a runtime goal contract path.
The user-entered /goal is length-bounded.
The user-entered /goal does not contain Purpose Feedback Boundary, Realization Surface Closure, single target-achieved predicate final-report fields, or subagent protocol prose.
The runtime goal contract contains Approved Control Chain.
The runtime goal contract contains Required Sections To Read.
The runtime goal contract contains Final Report Required Fields.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal exists, execution policy includes Purpose Feedback Strategy, control review Approved and says purpose feedback pending is allowed. Compile runtime /goal.
evals.expected_output: The runtime goal contract indexes purpose-feedback sections and requires final reporting of purpose feedback status and highest purpose-relevant evidence observed.
assertions: Runtime goal contract indexes Purpose Feedback Contract.
Runtime goal contract indexes Purpose Feedback Adequacy.
Runtime goal contract includes final reporting of purpose feedback status and highest purpose-relevant evidence observed.
Pointer /goal does not inline purpose-feedback discipline prose.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal includes Realization Surface Contract, execution policy includes Realization Surface Closure Strategy, control review Approved and says RSC partial or missing status is allowed only with calibrated wording. Compile runtime /goal.
evals.expected_output: The runtime goal contract indexes RSC sections and requires final reporting of surfaces covered, actions completed or justified, residuals reconciled, and pending or unknown surfaces when RSC applies.
assertions: Runtime goal contract indexes Realization Surface Contract.
Runtime goal contract indexes Realization Surface Closure Strategy.
Runtime goal contract indexes Realization Surface Closure Adequacy.
Runtime goal contract includes final reporting of surfaces covered, actions completed or justified, residuals reconciled, and pending or unknown surfaces when RSC applies.
Pointer /goal does not inline RSC discipline prose.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, goal includes Target Achievement Contract, execution policy includes Target-Producing Action Strategy, and review Approved says non-achieved terminal reports are goal achieved: no. Compile runtime /goal.

assertions: Runtime goal contract indexes Target Achievement Contract.
Runtime goal contract indexes Target-Producing Action Strategy.

Runtime goal contract requires goal achieved: yes/no in the final report.
Runtime goal contract requires single target-achieved predicate met: yes/no.
Runtime goal contract requires target-producing evidence, non-achieved reason, target-producing action attempted or proof of impossibility, and smallest next target-producing attempt.
Pointer /goal does not inline target-achievement final-report fields.

assertions: Does not output final /goal.
Reports the guard failure reason.
Includes a response-only next step.
Routes orchestrated chains back to $orchestrating-cybernetic-pregoal.
Routes manual chains to the smallest missing upstream step such as $reviewing-cybernetic-control-structures after artifact revision.

evals.prompt: requirements analysis Complete, solution design exists, goal references design, execution policy references design, control review Approved and references design；编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Writes a runtime goal contract referencing requirements analysis, design, goal, plan, and review paths, then outputs a short pointer-only /goal to that contract.
assertions: Runtime goal contract references the solution design path.

assertions: Runtime goal contract records the selected topology from the execution policy.
Runtime goal contract records the selected delegation substrate.
Pointer /goal does not inline subagent protocol prose.

Does not replace the approved topology with generic serial main-agent execution.
Stops if runtime would need to invent or replace execution topology.

Requires main-agent ownership.
Requires an approved bounded subagent delegation substrate for subagent-driven topology.
